core.label: Whitespace Fundamentals
core.description: Programming with only spaces, tabs, and linefeeds.

topics.label: The Three Characters
topics.description: Space, Tab, and Linefeed are the only significant characters. Everything else is ignored.

topics.label: Stack Manipulation
topics.description: Push, duplicate, swap, and discard stack values. Whitespace is stack-based.

topics.label: Arithmetic & I/O
topics.description: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and character/number I/O.

topics.label: Flow Control
topics.description: Labels, jumps, conditional jumps, and subroutine calls.
